decks.notes: The central idea of this deck is to establish dominance by manipulating the board through a combination of removal spells, counterspells, and card advantage. Baleful Strix serves as a versatile and resilient commander, providing card draw and defense. The deck aims to control the pace of the game, disrupting the opponent's strategy while building up its own resources. The focus is on maintaining control of the battlefield, gradually wearing down the opponent until victory is achieved through attrition. This strategy requires careful planning and resource management to outmaneuver and outlast the opponent.
